title: The study protocol and Python scripts used in the manuscript, "Predicting 72-hour Fatality in Severe Hyperphosphatemia."
author: Sueda, Keishiro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the study protocol and Python scripts used in the manuscript, "Predicting 72-hour Fatality in Severe Hyperphosphatemia." The provided materials include the detailed analysis protocol and code for comparative analyses using multivariate logistic regression and machine learning methods. These resources ensure transparency and reproducibility of our results. 
 This repository has been updated to reflect the latest version.
steps_raw:
This repository contains the study protocol and Python scripts used in the manuscript, "Predicting 72-hour Fatality in Severe Hyperphosphatemia." The provided materials include the detailed analysis protocol and code for comparative analyses using multivariate logistic regression and machine learning methods. These resources ensure transparency and reproducibility of our results. 
 This repository has been updated to reflect the latest version.
